rationale: Section 26.12 governs appraisal roll procedures and tax imposition timing for taxing units created mid-year. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts under§11.13(b), so increasing the exemption creates no conflict.
quote: Sec. 26.12. UNITS CREATED DURING TAX YEAR.
_note: No conflict found; §26.12 is procedural and does not address homestead exemption amounts.
